props.name: loading
props.description: Renders the panel in a loading state. We recommend that you also set a `loadingText`.

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Specifies the text that's displayed when the panel is in a loading state.

slots.name: default
slots.description:
Main content of the help panel.

Use `p, a, h3, h4, h5, span, div, ul, ol, li, code, pre, dl, dt, dd, hr, br, i, em, b, strong` tags to format the content.
Use `code` for inline code or `pre` for code blocks.

slots.name: header
slots.description:
Header of the help panel.

It should contain the only `h2` used in the help panel.
